name: 欺神弄鬼
developer: 猫台班子工作室 Cat Caboodle
publisher: 猫台班子工作室 Cat Caboodle
short_description: Tricks of Gods and Ghosts is a female-oriented pixel rpg game set in a hollow female background. In the game, you will play the role of Zhen Wu Si's Tiqi to move freely in the Jianghu and the imperial court. The sea of bureaucracy is full of changes. The fate of the world is yours to decide.
detailed_description:
关注我

Stay up to date with the latest news on Tricks of Gods and Ghosts:

·官方微博&小红书&b站：五肉

·QQ一群:759718289(已满）

QQ二群：687243405


About the Game

关于这款游戏

Welcome to Nan Sheng, an ancient matriarchal fantasy land teeming with gods, demons, and occasional modern marvels brought in by mysterious travelers. In this whimsical world, you’ll step into the shoes of a Tiqi (elite enforcer) under the Zhenwu Bureau, bearing the Moon Emperor’s secret decree to quell rising unrest among martial artists.

Your destiny is yours to shape. Will you exploit your authority to spark turmoil and seize power? Or pursue a path of peace, protecting the innocent? Perhaps you’ll claim the Mandate of Heaven itself. Embrace the chaos in this lighthearted RPG, where comedic madness and dramatic showdowns collide!

-Female-Dominant Setting

Nan Sheng’s societal structure places women at the highest tiers of power. This alternate reality flips conventional historical norms on their head—expect surprises around every corner.

-Male Pregnancy” & Black-Box Biology

True to its unconventional world, men can bear children in Nan Sheng. How? That’s part of the fantasy! There is no explicit discussion of anatomy—it’s left intentionally vague for comedic effect and player interpretation.

Roam the martial realm, infiltrate political circles, or become a defender of the people. Your actions will influence shifting allegiances—from sworn enemies to star-crossed allies.

-Fishing for Fun

Encounter 80+ distinct fish across freshwater, saltwater, magma pools, and icy lakes. Some fish can be sold, some are edible, and some are quest items. Plus, you might stumble upon random events or NPC interactions while fishing!

There will be three types of seeds in the game. These are regular seeds from the store, exotic seeds sold by foxes, and fantasy seeds.

Players watering certain fantasy plants will trigger some random plot. For example, a certain poisonous flower may cause you to fall into a brief hallucination when watering it.

-Light COC-Style Skill Checks

Rely on dice rolls for certain actions—like using the Listen skill to eavesdrop on gossip. Most scenarios hinge on simple success or failure, though a handful may lead to spectacular triumphs or disasters.

-Straightforward Combat

You start with decent strength. Switch weapons for melee attacks, summon a mechanical hawk, or toss landmines—simple controls ensure easy-to-learn battles that still pack a punch.

-Diverse Relationships

Forge unique bonds with multiple romance options including both male and female characters (and occasionally more unusual genders, too). Pursue pure love, gather a grand harem, or wage a thrilling love-hate rivalry. Each character has their own moral code and might even oppose you—choose wisely.

Important Disclaimer

  • This game is all-ages with no explicit content, despite the unconventional themes.

  • All main characters are 18+ to avoid any misunderstandings about age.

  • The focus is on humor, drama, and storytelling over realism or explicit depictions.

Additional Considerations

  • Matriarchal Context

    • Nan Sheng is a woman-led society, which may differ from typical historical or fantasy settings. Expect role reversals in power dynamics, social norms, and cultural expectations.

  • Fantasy “Male Pregnancy”

    • While the game includes a “male pregnancy” mechanic, it remains purely fantastical and comedic. We leave it intentionally vague (“black box biology”)—there’s no graphic or detailed depiction.

  • All-Characters-Are-Adults

    • In many regions, an “18+” label implies adult content. Here, it simply means every character is legally an adult; the story itself contains no explicit sexual scenes.

  • Comedic & Lighthearted

    • Expect a blend of comedic anachronisms, over-the-top plot twists, and dramatic flair. It is not a historically accurate simulation but rather a fantastical, melodramatic escapade.

  • Romance Variety

    • You can romance both male and female characters, alongside the possibility of more unconventional genders. Relationships may remain platonic, turn into devoted one-on-one romance, or veer into dramatic harems and rivalries.

  • Solo Developer

    • This entire project is created and managed by one person. Please understand that updates and replies to community questions may take time. We appreciate your patience and feedback!

Embrace the absurd and dive into this blend of martial intrigue, comedic chaos, and “dog-blood” drama. Tricks of Gods and Ghosts invites you to craft your own legend in a land where anything can happen—and probably will!
